title: DontDisruptMyLocatorBar
description: Prevents hiding of the locator bar on certain actions (breaking, placing blocks, etc...)
body:
**Simple single-mixin mod that prevents hiding the locator bar when breaking or placing blocks**

Made this because it annoyed me that I have to wait 5 seconds after breaking a block before I can make out where my friends are located. After all, knowing your progress toward the next XP level isn't exactly critical information.
